name: provenance manifest validator rejects a manifest missing all three consumption blocks when consumption is required
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance && printf '{"commit":"abc"}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/validate-consumption-schema.sh" --manifest .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json --require-consumption 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'no_consumption_blocks_present' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
